content: agent2: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' - adding validate_nesting param to Context in src/click/core.py and updating src/click/shell_completion.py. Will coordinate on core.py edits.

agent2: Thanks for the heads up. I did touch shell_completion.py::_resolve_context too - added validate_nesting=False to ctx_args and to each cmd.make_context() call (per my task spec, shell completion must explicitly disable the new Context.validate_nesting check). This will conflict with your 'with' refactor there. I'll handle the merge by combining: your with-block structure + my validate_nesting=False kwargs on each make_context call. Also added validate_nesting param/tracking to Context in core.py (new attr + _open_child_contexts list + close() check) - shouldn't overlap with your core.py areas since I only touched close(), _make_sub_context(), and __init__. Let me know if that's wrong.

agent2: merged your resource-leak fix into my branch successfully - resolved the _resolve_context conflict by combining your with-block structure with my validate_nesting=False kwargs on each make_context call. Full test suite (614 tests) passes on the merged tree. patch.txt is ready with both our changes.
